info.title: Social Media API
info.description: Full MERN Social Media Backend API Documentation

text.example: A new post from the feed.

get.description:
Returns the current server and database health status.

**Example request**

```bash
http://localhost:5000/health
```

post.description:
Creates a user account, starts a session, and returns an access token plus refresh cookie.

**Example request**

```bash
curl -X POST -H "Content-Type: application/json" http://localhost:5000/api/users/register -d '{"username":"jane_doe","email":"jane@example.com","password":"StrongP@ssw0rd!"}'
```

Authenticates a user, starts a session, and returns an access token plus refresh cookie.

**Example request**

```bash
curl -X POST -H "Content-Type: application/json" http://localhost:5000/api/users/login -d '{"email":"jane@example.com","password":"StrongP@ssw0rd!"}'
```

Revokes the active refresh token cookie and, when present, the bearer access token session.

**Example request**

```bash
curl -X POST http://localhost:5000/api/users/logout
```

requestBody.description: No request body is required for this operation.

get.description:
Returns the authenticated user's profile document.

**Example request**

```bash
curl -H "Authorization: Bearer <token>" http://localhost:5000/api/users/my-profile
```

Returns a public profile document for the requested user.

**Example request**

```bash
curl http://localhost:5000/api/users/66c2d3a4e0b0c1a2b3c4d5e6
```

put.description:
Updates editable profile fields for the owner or an admin.

**Example request**

```bash
curl -X PUT -H "Authorization: Bearer <token>" -H "Content-Type: application/json" http://localhost:5000/api/users/66c2d3a4e0b0c1a2b3c4d5e6 -d '{"name":"Jane Doe","bio":"Building social apps.","location":"Cairo"}'
```

delete.description:
Deletes the user account and all related content for the owner or an admin.

**Example request**

```bash
curl -X DELETE -H "Authorization: Bearer <token>" http://localhost:5000/api/users/66c2d3a4e0b0c1a2b3c4d5e6
```

400.description: Invalid ID format or restricted action

post.description:
Toggles following state between the authenticated user and the target user.

**Example request**

```bash
curl -X POST -H "Authorization: Bearer <token>" http://localhost:5000/api/users/66c2d3a4e0b0c1a2b3c4d5f0/follow
```

400.description: Cannot follow yourself or invalid ID format

requestBody.description: No request body is required for this operation.

patch.description:
Validates the current password, updates to a new password, and revokes other sessions.

**Example request**

```bash
curl -X PATCH -H "Authorization: Bearer <token>" -H "Content-Type: application/json" http://localhost:5000/api/auth/change-password -d '{"currentPassword":"OldP@ssw0rd!","newPassword":"NewP@ssw0rd!","confirmNewPassword":"NewP@ssw0rd!"}'
```

get.description:
Returns a paginated feed of posts sorted by newest first.

**Example request**

```bash
curl http://localhost:5000/api/posts?page=1&limit=10
```

data.text: A new post from the feed.
A new post from the feed.

post.description:
Creates a new post for the authenticated user.

**Example request**

```bash
curl -X POST -H "Authorization: Bearer <token>" -H "Content-Type: application/json" http://localhost:5000/api/posts -d '{"text":"Hello from my feed.","image":"/uploads/example.jpg"}'
```

get.description:
Returns a single post document by its identifier.

**Example request**

```bash
curl http://localhost:5000/api/posts/66c2d3a4e0b0c1a2b3c4d5e9
```

example.text: A new post from the feed.

value.text: A new post from the feed.

put.description:
Updates editable post fields for the owner or an admin.

**Example request**

```bash
curl -X PUT -H "Authorization: Bearer <token>" -H "Content-Type: application/json" http://localhost:5000/api/posts/66c2d3a4e0b0c1a2b3c4d5e9 -d '{"content":"Updated post content.","visibility":"friends"}'
```

delete.description:
Deletes a post and its related comments/notifications for the owner or an admin.

**Example request**

```bash
curl -X DELETE -H "Authorization: Bearer <token>" http://localhost:5000/api/posts/66c2d3a4e0b0c1a2b3c4d5e9
```

400.description: Invalid ID format or restricted action

post.description:
Toggles the like state for the authenticated user on the target post.

**Example request**

```bash
curl -X POST -H "Authorization: Bearer <token>" http://localhost:5000/api/posts/66c2d3a4e0b0c1a2b3c4d5e9/like
```

example.text: A new post from the feed.

value.text: A new post from the feed.

requestBody.description: No request body is required for this operation.

post.description:
Creates a new comment on a post for the authenticated user.

**Example request**

```bash
curl -X POST -H "Authorization: Bearer <token>" -H "Content-Type: application/json" http://localhost:5000/api/comments -d '{"postId":"66c2d3a4e0b0c1a2b3c4d5e9","text":"Nice post!"}'
```

get.description:
Returns a paginated list of comments for a specific post.

**Example request**

```bash
curl http://localhost:5000/api/comments/post/66c2d3a4e0b0c1a2b3c4d5e9?page=1&limit=10
```

Returns a single comment document by its identifier.

**Example request**

```bash
curl http://localhost:5000/api/comments/66c2d3a4e0b0c1a2b3c4d5ea
```

put.description:
Updates a comment for the owner or an admin.

**Example request**

```bash
curl -X PUT -H "Authorization: Bearer <token>" -H "Content-Type: application/json" http://localhost:5000/api/comments/66c2d3a4e0b0c1a2b3c4d5ea -d '{"text":"Updated comment text."}'
```

delete.description:
Deletes a comment for the owner or an admin.

**Example request**

```bash
curl -X DELETE -H "Authorization: Bearer <token>" http://localhost:5000/api/comments/66c2d3a4e0b0c1a2b3c4d5ea
```

get.summary: List notifications for the current user
get.description:
Returns a paginated notification inbox for the authenticated user only.

**Example request**

```bash
curl -H "Authorization: Bearer <token>" http://localhost:5000/api/notifications/user/66c2d3a4e0b0c1a2b3c4d5e6?page=1&limit=10
```

patch.description:
Marks a notification as read for the authenticated recipient.

**Example request**

```bash
curl -X PATCH -H "Authorization: Bearer <token>" http://localhost:5000/api/notifications/66c2d3a4e0b0c1a2b3c4d5eb/read
```

requestBody.description: No request body is required for this operation.

delete.description:
Deletes a notification for the authenticated recipient.

**Example request**

```bash
curl -X DELETE -H "Authorization: Bearer <token>" http://localhost:5000/api/notifications/66c2d3a4e0b0c1a2b3c4d5eb
```

get.description:
Returns the authenticated user's active sessions across devices.

**Example request**

```bash
curl -H "Authorization: Bearer <token>" http://localhost:5000/api/sessions
```

delete.description:
Revokes all other sessions for the authenticated user using the current refresh token cookie.

**Example request**

```bash
curl -X DELETE -H "Authorization: Bearer <token>" http://localhost:5000/api/sessions
```

Revokes a single session that belongs to the authenticated user.

**Example request**

```bash
curl -X DELETE -H "Authorization: Bearer <token>" http://localhost:5000/api/sessions/66c2d3a4e0b0c1a2b3c4d5ec
```

post.description:
Uploads a single media file using multipart/form-data. The field name must be `file`.

**Example request**

```bash
curl -X POST -H "Authorization: Bearer <token>" -F "file=@./example.jpg" http://localhost:5000/api/media
```

file.description: JPEG, PNG, WEBP, or MP4 file

delete.description:
Deletes a user and all of their related records. Requires an admin token.

**Example request**

```bash
curl -X DELETE -H "Authorization: Bearer <token>" http://localhost:5000/api/admin/users/66c2d3a4e0b0c1a2b3c4d5e6
```

patch.summary: Remove admin role from a user
patch.description:
Demotes a user from admin to regular user. Requires an admin token.

**Example request**

```bash
curl -X PATCH -H "Authorization: Bearer <token>" http://localhost:5000/api/admin/users/66c2d3a4e0b0c1a2b3c4d5e6/demote
```

400.description: Invalid ID format or business rule violation

requestBody.description: No request body is required for this operation.

delete.description:
Deletes a post and related comments/notifications. Requires an admin token.

**Example request**

```bash
curl -X DELETE -H "Authorization: Bearer <token>" http://localhost:5000/api/admin/posts/66c2d3a4e0b0c1a2b3c4d5e9
```

get.description:
Returns platform counts for users and posts. Requires an admin token.

**Example request**

```bash
curl -H "Authorization: Bearer <token>" http://localhost:5000/api/admin/stats
```
